title: Chandratal Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Chandratal Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Himachal Pradesh

overview.short: Chandratal Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in Lahaul and Spiti district in the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh.
overview.description: Chandratal Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in Lahaul and Spiti district in the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. It was first notified on 14 May 2007 and received final notification in June 2013 under the Wildlife Protection Act, 1972.

topPlaces.name: Chandra Taal
topPlaces.description: Chandra Taal (lit. 'moon lake') is a lake in the upper Chandra valley of the Lahul and Spiti district of Himachal Pradesh, India. Chandra Taal is near the source of the Chandra River.

topPlaces.name: Kunzum Pass
topPlaces.description: Kunzum Pass (Tibetan: Kunzum La, elev. 4,551 m or 14,931 ft), is a high mountain pass in the eastern Kunzum Range of the Himalayas.

items.note: Chandra Taal (lit. 'moon lake') is a lake in the upper Chandra valley of the Lahul and Spiti district of Himachal Pradesh, India. Chandra Taal is near the source of the Chandra River.
Kunzum Pass (Tibetan: Kunzum La, elev. 4,551 m or 14,931 ft), is a high mountain pass in the eastern Kunzum Range of the Himalayas.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chandratal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chandratal Wildlife Sanctuary is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chandratal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kullu-Manali Airport (Bhuntar) (80 km) and the nearest railway station is Chandigarh Railway Station (213 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chandratal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chandratal Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chandratal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Chandratal Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chandratal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chandra Taal, Kunzum Pass.
